summary: Completed testing of Admin Settings Hub Pack integration. All 12 settings sections render correctly with proper field types. Backend GET/PUT APIs working with MongoDB persistence. Save functionality shows success alert and persists data.
critical_code_review_comments: All 12 settings sections implemented correctly with reusable field components
PUT endpoint correctly merges with defaults and adds updated_at timestamp
Settings persist to MongoDB admin_settings collection as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings Hub fully tested. All 12 sections present: Commercial Rules, Margin Rules, Promotions, Affiliate Settings, Sales Settings, Payment Settings, Payment Account Settings, Progress Workflows, AI Assistant, Notifications, Vendors/Partners, Numbering Rules, Launch Controls. GET/PUT APIs working. Save button shows alert and persists to MongoDB.

GET /api/admin/settings-hub.details: Returns all settings with default values, all 12+ sections present

PUT /api/admin/settings-hub.details: Updates settings, merges with defaults, adds updated_at timestamp, persists to MongoDB

Settings page loads existing values from.details: Values loaded correctly on page load

Save All Settings button.details: Calls PUT API, shows 'Settings saved successfully.' alert

mocked_apis.none: All APIs use real MongoDB persistence
